positive: A whimsical celestial fox spirit (kitsune) with flowing tails, set against a stylized night sky. The fox is depicted in a strong, confident, and elegant silhouette style, composed centrally. The background should feature abstract geometric constellations, blooming bioluminescent florals, and gentle nebula swirls using deep indigo, cosmic violet, and shimmering gold accents. Emphasize clean lines, high contrast, and flat design elements for print clarity. Vector art aesthetic with a subtle gradient texture. Clean, crisp, graphic novel style, perfect for screen printing on fabric.
negative: photorealistic, excessive detail, complex anatomy, messy, blur, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low contrast, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, muddy colors, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters
